title: Keybind Profiler
description: With this mod you can now save and load keybinds
body:
**Keybind Profiler**
Your keybinds, your way — for every situation.

Ever jump into a PvP fight only to realize your keys are still set up for building? Or spend minutes rebinding everything before a speedrun? Keybind Profiler solves this by letting you save your entire keyboard layout as a profile and switch between them instantly.

What it does
Save your current keybinds to a named profile (e.g. "PvP", "Building", "Redstone", "Default")
Load any saved profile to instantly apply all keybinds at once
Delete profiles you no longer need
Unlimited profiles — create as many as you want
**How it works**
Go to Options → Controls → Keybind Profiles
Enter a name and hit Save Current — done, your layout is saved
Rebind your keys however you want
Come back and hit Load on any profile to restore it
All profiles are saved as simple JSON files in .minecraft/config/keybindprofiler/, so they persist across game restarts and are easy to back up or share.

Use cases
PvP vs Creative — different hotbar binds, sprint toggles, perspective keys
Modpacks — save a profile per modpack since each one adds different keybinds
Shared computers — each player saves their own layout and loads it when they sit down
Experimentation — try new layouts without fear of losing your current setup
Technical details
Client-side only — works on any server, no server-side installation needed
Supports all keybinds, including those added by other mods
Minecraft 1.21 – 1.21.1
Requires Fabric Loader + Fabric API
